input.headline: The Invisible Toll: How Warehouse Injuries Go Unreported
input.summary: An investigation revealing that major warehouse operators systematically underreport workplace injuries by classifying them as pre-existing conditions. Based on OSHA records, internal documents, and interviews with 40 workers.
input.arresting_line: For every injury that makes it into the official count, workers say three more are quietly reclassified or ignored.

input.headline: City Council Approves New Bike Lane Network
input.summary: The council voted 7-2 to approve a $28 million bike lane expansion covering 45 miles of city roads over three years.

input.headline: The Brussels Effect: How EU Tech Rules Are Reshaping Silicon Valley
input.summary: Feature on how the Digital Services Act and AI Act are forcing US tech companies to redesign products globally rather than maintain separate EU versions. Includes interviews with compliance officers at three major firms and analysis of the regulatory divergence between EU and US approaches.
input.arresting_line: The cheapest way to comply with EU law, it turns out, is to comply everywhere.
